PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2018 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Continued To Jul-02-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Stachnick in propria persona

The Court made inquiries regarding Mr. Stachnick's knowledge of Probate procedures and whether he is able to do this without an attorney. Mr. Stachnick stated that he understands the responsibilities, that all bills have been paid, and has the roadmap from his father's estate from 2001 which is the same Will. The Court requested a new proof of subscribing witness. Mr. Stachnick responded that the senior attorney passed away in 2009, the son, Paul, retired 11 years ago, and requested the matter be continued to July for him to contact the law firm to get find contact with the retired attorney. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to July 2, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for proof of subscribing witness.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
